title: Fix Behave stderr capture
description: Ensure click CliRunner captures stderr separately so stderr assertions work in Behave.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated python/features/steps/shared.py to use CliRunner(mix_stderr=False). Behave run now succeeds; coverage run with --source=taskulus returns 100%.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Behave steps can assert stderr without ValueError; tests pass.
